sourceRefs.summary: R006 evidence matrix for the 2025 SETD1B first-pass reproduction.
R006 analysis plan and fallback policy.
Public sequencing accession discovered but not downloaded in this pass.

rationale: The first-pass local supplement reproduction partially supports the existence and timing of broad H3K4me3/H3K27ac domains and early/late temporal gene sets, but it does not independently reproduce broad-vs-sharp peak calling, Setd1b cKO loss of broad domains, Pol II/TAF3 redistribution, Rfx2 KO recruitment, or gene-length/stage confounding controls. Therefore the correct package-level verdict remains insufficient-evidence, with explicit partially-reproduced subclaims.

supportingEvidenceRefs.summary: Table-level broad H3K4me3 domain inventory and width threshold check from S5.
Table-level H3K27ac/H3K4me3 broad-domain overlap check from S5.
Table-level early and late gene expression timing check from S8.

missingEvidence.summary: Independent broad-vs-sharp H3K4me3 reproduction requires merged non-broad peak lists, peak-height ranking, and processed ChIP-seq signal files or raw FASTQ execution.
Setd1b perturbation reproduction requires control/cKO H3K4me3/H3K27ac domain calls, Pol II/TAF3 occupancy outputs, RNA-seq count matrices, and stage-matched differential analyses.
Rfx2 perturbation and SETD1B recruitment remain unsupported by local tables; Rfx2 KO processed domains, motif output, and interaction quantification are needed.
Gene length, baseline expression, annotation version, batch, and stage-composition confounding checks are not resolved by S5/S8.

perClaimVerdicts.rationale: S5 supports broad-domain counts, length threshold, stage counts, and substantial H3K27ac overlap, but not independent peak calling or sharp/control peak comparison.
S5/S8 do not reproduce super-enhancer calling, enhancer assignment, eRNA quantification, GREAT/GO enrichment, or expression tests against matched controls.
S1 confirms Setd1b perturbation samples exist, but cKO ChIP-seq domain loss and signal profiles were not reproduced.
Pol II and TAF3 redistribution require processed occupancy data and differential analyses not present in S1/S5/S8.
S8 supports early and late temporal gene-set patterns, but Setd1b-dependent mistiming remains untested without cKO expression matrices.
Rfx2 KO and RFX2-SETD1B recruitment evidence is PDF-text only in the local subset.

operationalFailures: No raw or processed GEO GSE242515 sequencing files were downloaded by design.
The local supplement subset lacks sharp/control peak lists, cKO domain outputs, Rfx2 KO domain outputs, count matrices, and gene-length annotations.
operationalVsScientific.policy: Keep table-supported checks as partially-reproduced and unresolved perturbation/causal checks as insufficient-evidence. Do not mark not-reproduced or contradicted without a computed disagreement under documented methods.

diagnostics: This verdict is intentionally conservative because the central SETD1B-RFX2 causal claim has not been independently computed.
The artifact can be upgraded by adding processed GEO BED/bigWig/count matrix refs and rerunning the planned sensitivity checks.
